column1: Soft digital watercolor children's storybook cover illustration. A six-year-old Korean girl named Soi with shoulder-length black bob hair and a yellow star-shaped hairpin, wearing a bright yellow sundress with white apron and pink sneakers, stands in the center of a cozy futuristic living room, arms outstretched with a big joyful smile. Around her float small glowing sky-blue AI robots including Dudu her round companion, and tiny holographic stars fill the air. Behind her, her young Korean mother in a blue dress and father in white shirt and jeans embrace each other warmly, both smiling with pride. The composition has a generous empty area at the top of the illustration for title text, characters anchored in the lower two-thirds.
